cards.name: Fractal RLC spectral signatures
cards.statement: Conductive fractal RLC graphs may produce multi-scale frequency-response signatures distinguishable from regular and random baselines.
assumptions: The graph topology affects the nodal admittance matrix.
RLC component values are physically meaningful.
Regular and random baselines are implemented fairly.
predictions: Fractal graphs exhibit repeatable spectral signatures.
Some modes show localization or robustness under perturbation.

tests.name: fractal_rlc_spectral_response
tests.metric: peak distribution, eigenmode localization, response entropy
tests.falsifier: no robust difference versus regular/random baselines

positive_memory: RLC graph simulation is a safe bridge from geometry to measurable response.
negative_memory: Do not treat spectral signatures as superconductivity evidence.
next_actions: Build a minimal fractal_rlc_lab graph generator and frequency-response report.

cards.name: Fractal conductor superconductivity overclaim guard
cards.statement: Fractal conductor implies superconductivity should be transmuted into a testable RLC/topological-resonance hypothesis before any material claim is made.
assumptions: Scientific credibility requires separating geometry, simulation, material mechanisms and experimental criteria.
predictions: OAK review should block or transmute superconductivity claims without resistance, Meissner, gap and phase-coherence evidence.

tests.name: physics_claim_hygiene_audit
tests.success_condition: unsupported claims are transmuted into testable candidates

positive_memory: This anti-rule protects ambitious physics ideas from premature promotion.
negative_memory: No superconductivity claim without material measurements.
next_actions: Apply MemoryMinusEngine and ClaimTransmuter to every physics/material card.

cards.name: DimensionCheck for RLC equations
cards.statement: Every physics equation in the Fractal RLC Lab should pass a dimensional consistency check before promotion.
assumptions: Unit consistency is necessary but not sufficient for physical validity.
predictions: Dimension checks reduce invalid equations in physics prototypes.

tests.name: rlc_dimension_check
tests.success_condition: L q_ddot, R q_dot and C^-1 q all reduce to volts

positive_memory: RLC models are good because they can be checked dimensionally.
negative_memory: Dimensional correctness does not prove experimental feasibility.
next_actions: Add a minimal dimension_check helper for Fractal RLC equations.
